title: [podman-5.8] Bump c/image to v5.39.2 in common, common to v0.67.1
body:
<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

In preparation for Podman v5.8.2, bump c/image to v5.39.2 in common, and then common to v0.67.1.
